title: Could not use requested subdomain, retrying
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I try to build an integration app. 
I set my subdomain and it worked well until today. 
But today I got and log 
‘could not use requested subdomain, retrying’. 
and generated random name. 
I need static subdom…

posts.author: jychoiSPH (Noelia Choi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I try to build an integration app.

I set my subdomain and it worked well until today.

But today I got and log
‘could not use requested subdomain, retrying’.
and generated random name.

I need static subdomain to put it in my webhook integration recipe.
Is anyone know why the used subdomain can’t use anymore?

I have no idea of ‘@mondaydotcomorg/tunnel’ so I hope someone can help me!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @jychoiSPH and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to send this information to appsupport@monday.com along with your account ID, user ID and a screen recording or various screenshots showing the steps you are taking and the error you see?

From there, our technical team can take a closer look to the issue and give this following

Cheers,
Matias
